name: Parmesan Chicken Fingers with Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts into strips about 4 inches long and 1/2 inch wide.
2. Dip each strip into beaten eggs.
3. Dip again into a mixture of bread crumbs.
4. In a large skillet, melt half of the butter.
5. Cook the chicken in a single layer until crisp, about 3 minutes on each side, adding more butter as necessary.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve with lemon wedges, if desired.
